title: Better Soul Torches
description: Better Soul Torches turns soul torches and soul lanterns into anti-mob protection lights that prevent hostile mobs from spawning and push them out of protected zones
body:
**Anti-Mob Protection Using Soul Fire**

perfect for safer bases without ugly lighting.
- Soul Torches create small safe zones
-  Soul Lanterns create larger safe zones
-  Hostile mobs cannot spawn inside the light
-  Mobs entering the zone are smoothly repelled
-  Fully server-side & optimized for performance


**# What It Does**
Anti-Mob Light Zones

Soul lights create invisible protection zones:
Block	      |  Range	      |        Effect

Soul Torch	  |  Configurable |	Prevents spawns + repels mobs

Soul Lantern  |	Larger range  |	Stronger protection

✔ Hostile mobs cannot spawn inside

✔ Existing mobs are pushed out

✔ Works above & below the torch (vertical range)

✔ Multiple torches combine into larger safe areas


**Smart Repel System**
- Smooth push — no teleporting or rubber-banding
- Prevents mobs getting stuck in walls
- Lifts mobs if pushed into blocks
- Works on all dangerous mobs (zombies, creepers, etc.)
- Ignores bosses (Ender Dragon, Wither, Warden)


**Lag-Free Design**
Built for servers:
- Chunk-indexed torch lookup (no world scans)
- Only checks mobs near players
- Torch placement/removal updates instantly
- Multiple torches merge into one protection field


**Optional Visual Feedback**
Configurable particles when mobs hit the border:
- Low-spam
- Only triggers on impact
- Can be disabled

  
**Configurable Options**

```config/better-soul-torches.json```

- Torch & lantern range
- Repel strength
- Prevent natural spawns toggle
- Affect angry neutral mobs
- Particle effects toggle
- Client config sync


**Use Cases**

✔ Safe bases without lighting spam

✔ Protected villages & towns

✔ Mob-free farms & storage areas

✔ Adventure maps & modpacks


**Performance**
Designed for multiplayer servers:
- No heavy loops
- No tick lag
- Scales with player count


**Notes**
- Soul campfires are unchanged (purely cosmetic)
- Does not affect passive mobs or players
- Boss mobs are ignored for balance
